title: Payee Alias Term and Condition
description: Payee Alias Term and Condition is the legal, contractual, and policy-based rules that govern the creation, use, management, and liability of a payee alias within a banking or payment system.

PayeeAliasTermandConditionType.description: Payee Alias Term and Condition Type defines the rules, obligations, and legal requirements that govern how a payee alias can be used by a customer.
